title: Get NVIDIA Agentic AI Certified
description: The most industry-recognized agentic AI cert. Validates architecture, development, deployment, and governance skills. ~$300, intermediate level.
descriptionZh: 最受行业认可的Agentic AI认证。验证架构、开发、部署和治理技能。约$300，中级水平。

title: Contribute to an Open Source Agent Framework
description: Submit a PR to LangChain, CrewAI, or AutoGen. Even a docs fix or bug report counts. Shows you can work in production codebases.
descriptionZh: 向LangChain、CrewAI或AutoGen提交PR。即使是文档修复或bug报告也算。证明你能在生产代码库中工作。

title: Build a Public MCP Server and List It
titleZh: 构建并发布公开的MCP服务器
description: Build an MCP server that solves a real problem, publish it to npm/PyPI, and submit it to the MCP server directory. Instant credibility.
descriptionZh: 构建一个解决实际问题的MCP服务器，发布到npm/PyPI，并提交到MCP服务器目录。即刻获得信誉。

title: Start a Technical Blog
description: Write 4-6 posts about what you built during AgentPath. 'How I built a RAG pipeline from scratch' gets you noticed by hiring managers.
descriptionZh: 写4-6篇关于你在AgentPath中构建内容的文章。'我如何从零构建RAG管道'会让招聘经理注意到你。

title: Join the Agentic AI Summit Community
description: Berkeley RDI's Agentic AI Summit (Aug 2026) has 40K+ virtual attendees and an active Discord. Great for networking and staying current.
descriptionZh: 伯克利RDI的Agentic AI峰会（2026年8月）有4万+虚拟参与者和活跃的Discord。适合社交和了解最新动态。

title: Learn Agent Evaluation Deeply
description: Go beyond basic eval — learn RAGAS, DeepEval, custom benchmarks. The biggest gap in the market is people who can measure agent quality.
descriptionZh: 超越基础评估——学习RAGAS、DeepEval、自定义基准测试。市场上最大的缺口是能衡量Agent质量的人。

title: Build a Production Agent with Monitoring
description: Deploy an agent that real users interact with. Add LangSmith or custom observability. 'I ran this in production for 30 days' beats any tutorial.
descriptionZh: 部署一个真实用户交互的Agent。添加LangSmith或自定义可观测性。'我在生产环境运行了30天'胜过任何教程。

title: Study Multi-Modal Agents
description: Learn to build agents that work with images, audio, and video — not just text. Computer use, screen reading, voice interfaces.
descriptionZh: 学习构建处理图像、音频和视频的Agent——不仅仅是文本。计算机使用、屏幕阅读、语音界面。

title: Read 3 Key Papers
description: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting (Yao et al.), Toolformer (Schick et al.), Generative Agents (Park et al.). Understand the theory behind the tools.
descriptionZh: ReAct：推理与行动的协同（Yao等），Toolformer（Schick等），生成式Agent（Park等）。理解工具背后的理论。

title: Apply to 10 Jobs and Track Results
titleZh: 申请10份工作并追踪结果
description: Don't wait until you feel 'ready.' Apply to 10 agentic AI roles, track responses, iterate on your resume and portfolio based on what gets callbacks.
descriptionZh: 不要等到觉得'准备好了'。申请10个Agentic AI职位，追踪回复，根据回电情况迭代你的简历和作品集。

title: Teach Someone Else
description: Run a workshop, mentor a friend, or create a tutorial. Teaching forces you to fill gaps in your own understanding. You learn what you teach.
descriptionZh: 举办工作坊、指导朋友或创建教程。教学迫使你填补自己理解中的空白。教即学。

title: Build Your Own Agent Framework
description: Even a simple one. Parse tool schemas, implement the agent loop, handle tool calls. Understanding the internals makes you 10x better at using frameworks.
descriptionZh: 即使是简单的也好。解析工具schema、实现Agent循环、处理工具调用。理解内部原理让你使用框架的能力提升10倍。
